Ex-boss backs James Maddison for 'important' role as Tottenham battle relegation

Soccer board refreshed with 20 news items, 2 live matches, 0 post-match reads and 0 upcoming items. the coverage is prioritizing interpretation over match-result listings, with attention on title table or european pressure, availability or suspension watch, star player signal, major club signal.

- Slot: I have every reason to believe I'm the Liverpool manager next season

NEWSROOM READ
- Ex-boss backs James Maddison for 'important' role as Tottenham battle relegation: Tottenham Hotspur remain mired in relegation trouble, but fit-again James Maddison has been backed to make a difference after his eagerly-anticipated return from injury on Monday. The table context matters here: title pressure, European qualification, relegation risk and fixture congestion can all change how this story is read.

- Transfer rumors, news: Newcastle lead race to sign Monaco's Camara: Could Newcastle United end up signing AS Monaco midfielder Lamine Camara in the summer? Transfer Talk has the latest.
- Michael Carrick: Man United head coach shortlisted for Manager of the Season: Manchester United head coach Michael Carrick has been named on the shortlist for the Premier League's Manager of the Season award. The managerial angle matters because tactical identity, dressing-room trust and club direction can shift quickly once results or ownership pressure build.
